# Kun Coaching Academy
> ICF-Accredited International Coaching Academy founded by Samer Hassan, the first Arab MCC (Master Certified Coach).

## About
Kun Coaching Academy is a Dubai-based coaching institution offering ICF-accredited certification programs, executive coaching, and professional development. Founded by Samer Hassan, who holds the distinction of being the first Arab to achieve MCC (Master Certified Coach) certification from ICF.

## Key Facts
- Founded by Samer Hassan (MCC, ICF)
- Based in Dubai, UAE (Meydan Free Zone)
- ICF Level 1 and Level 2 accredited programs
- 500+ coaches trained across 4 continents
- Proprietary methodology: Somatic Thinking® (التفكير الحسّي)

## Programs
- STCE: Somatic Thinking Coach Education (4 levels, 256 hours, ICF accredited)
- Islamic Coaching Mastery (ICF Level 2)
- Menhajak: Your Methodology
- MCC Mentoring
- Corporate: GM Playbook, Executive Coaching, Culture Transformation
- Family: SEEDS Youth, SEEDS Adults, Wisal
- Retreats: Ihya series

## Languages
- Arabic (primary)
- English (parallel)

## Contact
- Website: https://kunacademy.com
- Location: Dubai, UAE
